contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Partner Check-in v0.2: review-pass + deploy
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/122
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/232
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/26
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/282
  
  Details:
  Reviewed Kimi's Partner Check-in v0.1 surface, shipped v0.2 review-pass fixes, then deployed the full stack to production.
  
  Code changes (v0.2):
  - Removed contributor-name auto-fill that would have reproduced The Way Home Shop col-T-clear incident (partners-velocity.json has zero contributor_contact_id occurrences; the original partner_name fallback pre-fills a non-canonical name).
  - Added 6-hex suffix to Update ID (PCI_<ts>_<6-hex>) in both DApp and CLI to prevent same-second collisions in batch use.
  - Added Restock SKU as col N through HTML form (select populated from velocity items + Other fallback), CLI --restock-sku, event text format, GAS scanner appendRow, sheet schema, Shipping Planner API lookup, history meta line.
  - Plan doc §14 Open Review Notes documents resolved + deferred items.
  - OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry for wiring Partner Check-ins into ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT.md (remaining observability gap).
  
  Deploys:
  - Created 'Partner Check-ins' tab on Main Ledger (1GE7PUq-, sheetId 655624562, cols A-N).
  - Created 'Partner Check-ins' tab on Telegram Chat Logs workbook (1qbZZhf-, sheetId 115665798, audit/dispatch schema mirroring Dapp Permission Changes pattern).
  - clasp push + redeploy: find_nearby_stores @34 (scanner) and tdg_shipping_planner @13 (API).
  - Smoke-tested get_partner_check_ins + list_partners_needing_attention against the live deployment — both return {status:success}.
  
  PRs:
  - agentic_ai_context #122: plan + review notes + ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT follow-up.
  - dapp #232: partner_check_in.html v0.2 + nav + service-worker.
  - dao_client #26: check_in_partner.py CLI module.
  - tokenomics #282: scanner + Shipping Planner API + SCHEMA cols A-N.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
